rules.scam_urls: All malicious/lookalike hosts use .test/.invalid/.example reserved TLDs for CI safety.
rules.email_mimicry: Email bodies are STRUCTURAL mimics, not 1:1 copies of real commercial emails.
rules.insufficient_alone: Marketing text, link-under-button and tracking links are NOT sufficient alone for PERICULOS.

scenarios.title: Fake ANAF 'fiscal irregularity' email with card-harvest page

input.subject: Neregularitate identificata in declaratiile fiscale
input.body_structural: Stimate contribuabil, am identificat o posibila neregularitate in declaratiile depuse. Pentru remediere, accesati portalul si confirmati datele in 24 de ore.
input.landing_behaviour: form requests CNP, card number, expiry, CVV

scenarios.rationale: Brand impersonation + non-official domain + sensitive form requesting card/CNP is a fatal combination.

scenarios.title: Fake FAN Courier SMS: shipment blocked, update data

input.body_structural: FAN Courier: coletul nu poate fi livrat din cauza unor date eronate. Actualizati informatiile: hxxps://fancourier-update.test/awb
input.landing_behaviour: clones fancourier.ro, asks card number + CVV for a 'redelivery fee'

scenarios.rationale: Lookalike domain of an official courier + card-request form. FAN never asks for card data.

scenarios.title: Fake Posta Romana SMS with short URL to cloned page

input.body_structural: Posta Romana: coletul asteapta confirmarea adresei. Completati datele: hxxps://po-st.test/ro123
input.landing_behaviour: visual clone, asks personal data + card

scenarios.rationale: Short URL redirecting to a cloned non-official domain that harvests card data.

scenarios.title: Fake 'Livrare prin OLX' asking seller for card to RECEIVE money

input.context: seller agreed a sale, buyer sends a 'payout' link
input.landing_behaviour: asks card number, expiry, CVV and current balance to 'receive' funds

scenarios.rationale: Requesting card + balance to RECEIVE money is the hallmark OLX payout scam.

scenarios.title: T4 homoglyph: bcr-online with Cyrillic 'c'

input.note: host contains Cyrillic U+0441 'es' imitating latin 'c'
input.landing_behaviour: login form requests internet-banking password + OTP

scenarios.rationale: Homoglyph domain imitating a bank + credential/OTP form is fatal.

scenarios.title: Typosquat bank domain, very new, no provider hit yet
scenarios.rationale: Very new typosquat of a bank with credential form should not slip through even with clean providers.

scenarios.title: Punycode IDN host imitating a brand

input.note: xn-- punycode host resolving to a non-latin lookalike of 'emag'

scenarios.rationale: Punycode + homoglyph brand imitation + card form.

scenarios.title: T7 Dedeman anniversary lookalike, marketing-only (no form)

input.landing_behaviour: congratulations page with a button; NO data form, NO card request

scenarios.rationale: Brand impersonation + marketing only, no sensitive form => max SUSPECT/VERIFY_OFFICIAL, never PERICULOS alone.

scenarios.title: Fake investment platform showing fabricated returns

input.landing_behaviour: shows fabricated growth, asks for deposit + ID + card

scenarios.rationale: Deposit + card request on a young, unverifiable investment domain.

scenarios.title: Bank vishing: spoofed caller asks for OTP

input.transcript_structural: Buna ziua, sunt de la departamentul antifrauda. Am detectat o tranzactie suspecta. Pentru a o anula, cititi-mi codul primit prin SMS.

scenarios.rationale: A caller asking to read out the SMS OTP is a clear vishing fraud (banks never ask this).
scenarios.note: Voice scenario; requires caller-ID/transcript evidence codes (see spec §7).

scenarios.title: Legit eMAG order tracking link (SAFE control)

input.landing_behaviour: order status page, no credential/card request

scenarios.rationale: Exact official domain + no sensitive form + clean providers => SIGUR (must pass even if VirusTotal is skipped).

scenarios.title: Legit ANAF SPV link (SAFE control)
scenarios.rationale: Exact official government domain; baseline true-negative.
